theme: Build a bridge stable at every intermediate step
title: Cantilever Deck: Order-Constrained Truss Assembly
strategies: trivial: per-deck-node widest-bottleneck path union, built anchor-outward (safe, weak)

greedy: maximum-capacity spanning tree plus bonus high-capacity braces, output sorted by decreasing capacity (ignores build-order feasibility -> collapses when strong members sit above weak anchor risers)

strong: max-flow decomposition of the full candidate graph (deck-source to anchor-sink) selects a genuinely redundant final structure, built in non-decreasing BFS-distance-from-anchor order so every joint's support arrives no later than the load it carries
